message:
feat(core): add concurrent commit planning page-one serialization test

Add test_commit_planning_page_one_surface_serializes_disjoint_concurrent_growth_writers
to verify that page 1 correctly serializes disjoint concurrent growth
writers through the commit planning surface. Also fix misplaced doc
comment and clippy allow attributes on execute_single_join.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
